## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Release/support work

## Privacy And Permissions Checklist

- [ ] This change keeps AudioPilot local-only.
- [ ] This change does not add telemetry, analytics, or network calls.
- [ ] This change does not add microphone, camera, Accessibility, Screen Recording, Apple Events, or automation permissions.
- [ ] This change uses only public Apple APIs.
- [ ] If permissions or privacy behavior changed, README and SECURITY.md were updated.

## Testing

- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] Xcode build
- [ ] Manual menu bar test
- [ ] Manual audio output switch test

## Notes For Reviewers

Mention any tradeoffs, known limitations, or follow-up work.
